description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on push to master branch or tags matching a version pattern in QuickOSM directory and on pull requests to master in the same directory. The workflow has three jobs: flake8, test-qgis, and release. The flake8 job checks Python linting, test-qgis runs tests in a Docker environment, and release job creates a GitHub release with Qt and QGIS setup, packaging and deploying a zip file.
